summary: Share Demo feature testing complete. All 19 tests passed. The ?demo=true URL parameter correctly auto-enables Demo Mode for unauthenticated visitors, showing full navigation, Share Demo button, Sign Up Free button, and demo banner. Share Demo button copies URL to clipboard with success toast. Demo mode persists across page navigation via sessionStorage. Closing demo banner (X button) correctly disables demo mode. Mobile menu shows Share Demo Link button when demo mode is on.
passed_tests: Opening /dashboard?demo=true auto-enables Demo Mode without authentication
Demo banner visible at top with text 'Demo Mode: Data simulated for preview.' (data-testid='demo-mode-global-banner')
Share Demo button visible in nav header when demo mode is on (data-testid='share-demo-btn')
Clicking Share Demo button copies URL to clipboard and shows success toast 'Demo link copied!'
Full dashboard navigation shown for unauthenticated demo visitors (Dashboard, Simulation, Research, AI Agents, Event Agents, Strategy Lab, Marketplace, Referrals, Copy Trading, Leaderboard)
Dashboard page loads with live signals data in demo mode without auth
Navigate to /simulation page from demo mode - page loads correctly
Navigate to /agents page from demo mode - page loads correctly
Navigate to /events page from demo mode - page loads correctly
Navigate to /lab page from demo mode - page loads correctly
Navigate to /marketplace page from demo mode - page loads correctly
Navigate to /leaderboard page from demo mode - page loads with Copy buttons (PRO features unlocked)
Navigate to /copy-trading page from demo mode - page loads with full features (no PRO gate)
Navigate to /referrals page from demo mode - page loads correctly
Navigate to /research page from demo mode - page loads correctly
'Sign Up Free' button visible in nav for unauthenticated demo visitors (data-testid='demo-signup-btn')
Demo mode persists in sessionStorage when navigating between pages
Closing demo banner (X button) disables demo mode and restores normal state
Mobile menu shows Share Demo Link button when demo mode is on (data-testid='share-demo-btn-mobile')
critical_code_review_comments: Share Demo feature implementation is well-structured with shareDemoLink() function in DemoModeContext
URL parameter detection (?demo=true) works correctly in useState initializer
Clipboard API with fallback to execCommand for older browsers
Toast notification provides clear feedback on successful copy
Mobile menu correctly shows Share Demo Link button with data-testid='share-demo-btn-mobile'
PRO gating bypass works correctly using isDemoMode check in CopyTradingPage and LeaderboardPage
seed_data_creation: None - used demo mode with mock data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Share Demo feature fully tested and working. Key test-ids: share-demo-btn (desktop nav), share-demo-btn-mobile (mobile menu), demo-mode-global-banner (top banner), demo-banner-close (X button), demo-signup-btn (Sign Up Free button for unauthenticated demo visitors). Demo URL: /dashboard?demo=true auto-enables demo mode via URL parameter detection in DemoModeContext useState initializer.

mocked_apis.note: Demo Mode uses mockData.js for all simulated data when enabled
mocked_list: All dashboard data in Demo Mode via DemoModeContext - signals, portfolio stats, agents, strategies, copy traders, leaderboard, chart data
